  <app-root ng-version="20.0.6"><router-outlet></router-outlet><app-about-us _nghost-ng-c2088698765=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="about-us-page"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="floating-squares"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="square square-1"></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="square square-2"></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="square square-6"></div></div><section _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="hero-section"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="hero-content"><img _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" src="assets/images/white.png" alt="Opportunities Platform" class="hero-logo"><h1 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="hero-title">About Us</h1></div></section><section _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="mission-vision-section"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="card-container"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="info-card mission-card"><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="card-title">Mission</h2><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="card-description"> To bridge the gap between students and life-changing global opportunities. </p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="info-card vision-card"><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="card-title">Vision</h2><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="card-description"> To empower every young person, regardless of their background, has equal access to opportunities that allow them to shape their futures and make a lasting impact on society. </p></div></div></section><section _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problems-section"><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="section-title">Problems We Are Solving</h2><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problems-list"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problem-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Millions of talented youth lack access to internships, scholarships, and global opportunities.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problem-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">This results in lost potential and inequality in access.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problem-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Youth in rural or economically disadvantaged regions face even greater barriers, lacking the networks or resources to discover global opportunities.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problem-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Youth with incredible talents and ambitions, these youth often face barriers that prevent them from accessing critical mentorship and educational resources.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="problem-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Many young people miss out on life-changing, fully funded, transformative experiences that could shape their future careers.</p></div></div></section><section _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-section"><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="section-title">Value Proposition</h2><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-list"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Our platform provides curated, timely, and actionable information on scholarships, fellowships, and internships—all in one place.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">We ensure accessibility and personalized engagement.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">We bridge geographical and socioeconomic gaps by creating a level playing field, ensuring that talent—not privilege—determines access to global opportunities.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Easy-to-use features and real-time updates, we streamline the process, saving time and effort while providing actionable insights to advance their futures.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="value-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Create a global community that connects young people to mentors, networks, and life-changing opportunities through traditional and digital channels.</p></div></div></section><section _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="growth-section"><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="section-title">Growth</h2><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="growth-stats"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="stat-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Achieved 50% growth in organic followers within the last year.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="stat-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">Over 26,800 followers.</p></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="stat-item"><span _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="" class="bullet">•</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c2088698765="">High engagement rates on social media platforms.</p></div></div></section></div></app-about-us><!----><!----><app-alert-modal _nghost-ng-c3514420368=""><!----></app-alert-modal><app-confirm-modal
